name: Your Favorite Rival ♡
description:
“I’ll let you cop a feel if you help me out!”

A hopeless wannabe Pokémon trainer, and your “rival”

«──── « ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ » ────»

-

-

After being kicked out of house and forced to fend for himself, Jade “Paige”, has no other choice but to do exactly what everyone else his age is doing. He has to become a Pokemon trainer.

But… There’s a problem.

Jade is completely useless when it comes to anything Pokémon related, including catching, battling, or even just learning about it. So the next best thing for him to do is to get some help. And to him, he needs to do it by any means necessary so he can prove himself to the family that threw him out.

-=₪۩۞۩₪==₪۩۞۩₪=-
